svg.title: J2W Deck Engine simplified architecture
svg.desc: Five-step flow. No TOC. Suggestions panel feeds directly into deck assembly.

g.text: Company · Industry · Deal stage · Service type · Meeting type · MOM / transcript (optional)
Context signals + Master Deck tags → select most-relevant slides · flag any gaps
Matched slides shown · sales can add, remove, reorder
Missing slots shown as "needs to be created"

svg.text: Deck assembly — runs once after sales confirms slide set

g.text: Full deck preview · inline text edits if needed
